scripts.build: npm run build -w @tinysa/contracts && npm run build -w @tinysa/analysis && npm run build -w @tinysa/agent && npm run build -w @tinysa/device && npm run build -w @tinysa/test-device && npm run build -w @tinysa/desktop
scripts.dev: npm run prepare:signal-lab-bridge && npm run dev -w @tinysa/desktop
scripts.check:launcher: node --check tools/dev-launcher/main.cjs && node --check tools/dev-launcher/install.mjs && node --test tools/dev-launcher/bounded-log.test.cjs
scripts.train:signal-classifier: tsup tools/train-observable-classifier.ts --format esm --out-dir dist/tools --platform node --silent && node dist/tools/train-observable-classifier.js
scripts.check:signal-classifier-model: tsup tools/train-observable-classifier.ts --format esm --out-dir dist/tools --platform node --silent && node dist/tools/train-observable-classifier.js --check
scripts.check:signal-classifier: tsup tools/validate-signal-lab-classifier.ts --format esm --out-dir dist/tools --platform node --silent && node dist/tools/validate-signal-lab-classifier.js
scripts.check:bayesian-detector: tsup tools/validate-bayesian-detector.ts --format esm --out-dir dist/tools --platform node --silent && node dist/tools/validate-bayesian-detector.js
scripts.release:trio: npm --prefix ../TinySA_SignalLab run check && npm run check:trio-contract && npm run check && npm run check:bayesian-detector && npm run check:signal-classifier-model && npm run check:signal-classifier && npm run check:signal-classifier-publication && npm run check:firmware-twin
scripts.check: npm run prepare:signal-lab-bridge && npm run check:launcher && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm test
